annotation_corpus.decision: ACCEPTED: 25-doc sample is sufficient; the full 10,500-doc corpus (build-plan §5.4) is NOT required
annotation_corpus.rationale: Full-corpus annotation was multi-day single-process; the 25-doc mixed sample validates the LayoutLMv3/Donut pipeline end-to-end across all 6 document types. See docs/DATA_GUIDANCE_NOTES.md.

external_datasets.name: MIDV-500
external_datasets.role: OCR robustness testing only — European/Russian IDs, NOT Indian document training
external_datasets.reason: Distribution URLs 404; real set is 50+ per-type FTP zips (~32GB). Out of scope per build plan (OCR-robustness only; deferred with the Phase B OCR models).

external_datasets.name: MIDV-2020
external_datasets.role: OCR robustness testing — extended lighting/angle variations
external_datasets.reason: Same as MIDV-500: 404 URLs, large FTP-only distribution, OCR-robustness use only.

external_datasets.name: RVL-CDIP
external_datasets.role: LayoutLMv3 backbone fine-tuning smoke sample (generic layout features), NOT an Indian classifier
external_datasets.reason: Full archive is ~38.7GB (not gated, but exceeds free disk); datasets>=5.0 can't stream it via load_dataset (legacy loading script unsupported). Instead, scripts/download_rvlcdip_subset.py streams the tar.gz directly and extracts a class-balanced 320-image (38.6MB) smoke sample. See docs/DATA_GUIDANCE_NOTES.md.

external_datasets.name: DocVQA
external_datasets.reason: Source (rrc.cvc.uab.es) requires a registered account. ANLS scoring math is unit-tested; the live gate runs once weights + a held-out QA set are available.

download_budget_note: Keep external dataset downloads within 500 MB to 1 GB total; only FUNSD is intended to be downloaded locally in this workspace snapshot. MIDV-500, MIDV-2020, RVL-CDIP, and DocVQA remain deferred because their official distributions are much larger or require special access.
